## Problem statement

What problem does this solve? Who benefits? (Be specific — e.g., "first-time job seekers in rural SA who can't afford internet bundles struggle with X")

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see built.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Acceptance criteria

A short checklist of what "done" looks like:
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional context

Mockups, references, or related issues.
